name: Gequity S.p.A.
summary: Investimenti e Sviluppo SpA is a real estate investment firm. The firm manages real estate funds of their acquired portfolio companies. It also engages in leasing activities. The firm was previously known as Centenari E Zinelli Spa. It was earlier into private equity and venture capital investments. Investimenti e Sviluppo SpA was founded in 1907 and is based in Milan, Italy. As of May 22, 2017, Gequity S.p.A. operates as a subsidiary of HRD Italia Srl.
